articles.title: Everett native Ellen Pompeo to star in Boston-set crime dramedy
articles.description:
Pompeo will star in a lead role and serve as an executive producer for the upcoming series, which has been given a pilot order.

The post Everett native Ellen Pompeo to star in Boston-set crime dramedy appeared first on Boston.com.

articles.title: Vampires, literary monsters and a cake: The Tony Awards are here
articles.description:
Twenty-four Broadway shows will hope to nab at least one win Sunday across the 26 Tony categories. Grammy Award-winner Pink is the host.

The post Vampires, literary monsters and a cake: The Tony Awards are here appeared first on Boston.com.
